arts.ttl: Premier League Inflated Man City’s €35M-Rated Standout’s Price After Brighton, PSG Links
arts.sum: Manchester City finalized this winter transfer window the €35 million transfer of 19-year-old Brazil youth international defender Vitor Reis from Palmeiras. ESPN Brazil previously reported that Manchester United, Arsenal, and Paris Saint-Germain are all interested in the 19-year-old. However, with Reis under contract until December 2028 and a €100 million release clause, a transfer anytime […] The post Premier League Inflated Man City’s €35M-Rated Standout’s Price After Brighton, PSG Links appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Robbie Fowler Sees Aston Villa as Ideal Fit for £60M-Rated Man Utd Loanee Despite PSG, Barça Links
arts.sum: With the January transfer window now closed, clubs wrapped up their final deals to strengthen their squads for the second half of the 2024-25 season. One of the most notable moves saw Marcus Rashford depart Manchester United for Villa Park. arts.ttl: Moatasem Al-Musrati fit to make Monaco debut against PSG
arts.sum: Moatasem Al-Musrati (28) has confirmed that he is ready to make his AS Monaco when they face Paris Saint-Germain on Friday night. The Libya international joined Les Monégasques on deadline day on…

arts.ttl: Napoli Chief Reveals Details of Failed £70M-Rated PSG, Tottenham January Target Deal with Man Utd
arts.sum: During the winter transfer window, Alejandro Garnacho found himself at the center of speculation, with rumors linking him to a move away from Manchester United. Despite the interest, the young forward stayed at Old Trafford, and behind the scenes, there were some intriguing details about how a potential transfer could have unfolded.
